summary: Backend testing for Alumni department snapshot fix. All 9 review steps covered by 8 pytest cases; all PASSED. Cleanup of seed data verified (0 TEST_ docs left).
critical_code_review_comments: alumni.list_alumni prefers graduation_data.department_snapshot over current lookup — verified working, protecting historical view even when student.department_id is tampered.
restore_alumni_to_student correctly restores department_id/faculty_id from snapshot.
backfill_alumni_department_snapshot_internal is idempotent (uses $exists filter) and marks records with backfilled=true.
bulk_graduate_students returns structured failed[] with {id, error} and skipped[] with reason='متخرج بالفعل' for already-graduated — matches UI expectation.

Minor: filters faculty_id/department_id in list_alumni still query the raw student fields (not the snapshot). If a student's dept_id was corrupted, the snapshot-based display could show 'الشريعة والقانون' but the record wouldn't match a filter by that department_id. Consider filtering against snapshot too for consistency.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 faculty (TEST_شريعة_وقانون) + 1 other faculty + 1 department 'الشريعة والقانون' + 1 other dept + 3 active students + 2 extra students during tests. All cleaned up post-run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Existing production alumnus 'خالد' already backfilled with snapshot (verified in DB before tests). Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_alumni_department_snapshot.py is idempotent and cleans up after itself.
rca of the issue: Original bug: graduated students showed wrong department because list_alumni was reading current department_id/faculty_id via live lookup; if department was renamed or student's department_id was later mutated, alumni card would display wrong values. Fix: capture department_snapshot at graduation time and prefer it in list/restore/detail paths. Backfill on startup covers legacy records. Verified end-to-end.
